_comment: Smart order: support / defend a friendly unit (#86). Seed-plus-orders replay: at ~0.4s the Archers (uid 2) are ordered to SUPPORT the Infantry (uid 1); at ~1.5s the Infantry advances. Watch the archers shadow the infantry, holding station off it and firing on any enemy that closes on it instead of chasing whatever's nearest to themselves.
caption: Smart order — Support/defend (#86): the Archers are ordered to guard the Infantry (press G, right-click the friendly). They shadow their ward, hold a short standoff, and loose volleys on enemies that close on it — peeling to meet threats to their charge, then returning. Reverts to normal if the ward falls.
